title: selaginella balansae
intro: Selaginella balansae is a type of ancient, vascular plant commonly referred to as a "living fossil," belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella balansae include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella balansae is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and dried extracts, with some studies suggesting its effectiveness in treating various ailments, including hypertension and diabetes.
